recommendations.title: The Kiss of the Vampire
recommendations.overview: Honeymooning in Bavaria, a young couple becomes stranded and is forced to stay the night in the area. Doctor Ravna, owner of the impressive chateau that sits imposingly above the village, invites them to dinner that evening. Their association with Ra

recommendations.title: Hostel: Part II
recommendations.overview: Three American college students studying abroad are lured to a Slovakian hostel, and discover the grim reality behind it.

recommendations.title: Yannick
recommendations.overview: In the middle of a performance of the play "Le Cocu", a bad boulevard comedy at a Parisian theatre, Yannick gets up and interrupts the show to take the evening back in hand.

recommendations.title: Perfect Strangers
recommendations.overview: During a dinner, a group of friends decide to share whatever message or phone call they will receive during the evening, with unforeseen consequences.

recommendations.title: Rental Family
recommendations.overview: An American actor in Tokyo struggles to find purpose until he lands an unusual gig: working for a Japanese 'rental family' agency, playing stand-in roles for strangers. As he immerses himself in his clients' worlds, he begins to form genuine bonds th

recommendations.title: The Concorde... Airport '79
recommendations.overview: Aviation disaster-prone Joe Patroni must contend with nuclear missiles, the French Air Force and the threat of the plane splitting in two over the Alps.

recommendations.title: Deep
recommendations.overview: Four insomniac med school students are lured into a neuroscience experiment that spirals out of control and must find a way out before it’s too late.
recommendations.director: Thanabodee Uawithya, Jetarin Ratanaserikiat, Apirak Samudkitpaisan, Sita Likitvanichkul, Adirek Watleela

recommendations.title: K-19: The Widowmaker
recommendations.overview: When Russia's first nuclear submarine malfunctions on its maiden voyage, the crew must race to save the ship and prevent a nuclear disaster.

recommendations.title: Chernobyl: Abyss

recommendations.title: Hotel Rwanda
